svg.text: Smart pump decision engine — water & electricity waste prevention

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do soil moisture sensors send data to the backend?')
sendPrompt('Which weather API gives 48h rainfall forecast for free?')
sendPrompt('How are FAO crop water requirement tables stored and used?')
sendPrompt('Explain the full pump decision logic with all three conditions')
g.text: Q1: Is moisture below threshold? Q2: Will it rain? Q3: How much water needed?

svg.text: Step 3 — evaluate: rule engine first, ML if borderline

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What are all the rule-based conditions that trigger skip or irrigate?')
sendPrompt('How does the scikit-learn regression model predict irrigation need?')
sendPrompt('How is the exact pump duration calculated from crop water needs?')
g.text: Irrigate: run pump 1.5h at 5am OR Skip: rain in 18h, moisture OK

svg.text: Step 5 — deliver to farmer + log everything

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the irrigation recommendation look like in the farmer app UI?')
sendPrompt('How does the system schedule pumps during off-peak electricity hours?')
sendPrompt('What water and electricity data is logged after each irrigation event?')
sendPrompt('What MongoDB collections store water and electricity usage history?')
sendPrompt('What does the officer water saving report show?')
sendPrompt('How does the ML model retrain weekly on new irrigation data?')
